results.name: northern air temple
results.description: The Air Temple that was resettled by a group of Earth Kingdom refugees led by the Mechanist. It also served as the setting for the climactic showdown at the end of The Legend of Korra's third season.

results.name: not a hat
results.description: Things that are not hats, being used as hats.

results.name: not canon
results.description: Things that we know never actually happened in the game's story.

results.name: noted tracked information
results.description: Cards that have you note something down in order to track it.

results.name: notorious templating
results.description: Cards with effects that have to be templated in such a way that they are confusing to read at first glance. They don't have to be complex effects in practice (such as Animate Dead), but require a large amount of text to function in Magic.

results.name: nude
results.description: Beings that look like they should have clothing having none.

results.name: nuka cola
results.description: Bottles of nuka cola, or its bottle caps or vending machines.

results.name: null
results.description: A particular kind of zombie found on Zendikar.

results.name: null moon
results.description: An ancient satellite of Dominaria.

results.name: number joke
results.description: Card art that deliberately show things in a certain amount, usually due to the card's name and/or effect.

results.name: nykthos
results.description: A sacred shrine on Theros from which Nyx can be seen most clearly.

results.name: nyssa
results.description: A noble scion from the planet Traken, and a companion to the Fourth and Fifth Doctor. Absolutely no relation to [Nissa Revane](https://tagger.scryfall.com/tags/artwork/nissa-revane).

results.name: nyx
results.description: The realm of the gods on Theros, associated with dreams and depicted as the night sky.

results.name: oak street
results.description: A street on Ravnica.

results.name: ob nixilis (demon)
results.description: Ob Nixilis, now a demon.

results.name: ob nixilis (human)
results.description: Ob Nixilis, when we was still a human.

results.name: odric (human)
results.description: Odric, when he was still a human.

results.name: odric (vampire)
results.description: Odric, now a vampire.

results.name: off-brand white mana symbol
results.description: "We have white mana symbol at home." White mana symbol at home:

results.name: offcolor ability
results.description: Abilities with a mana cost outside the card's colors.

results.name: offcolor additional cost
results.description: Cards with an additional cost of mana beyond the card's own colors.

results.name: offcolor mana generation
results.description: Non-colorless cards that generate colored mana, but don't generate their own color of mana.

results.name: offcolor reminder text
results.description: Cards with symbols in their reminder text that aren't in their cost/colour identity
